name: TaRMS
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: ZIMRA's Tax and Revenue Management System through which new businesses register as taxpayers.

name: VAT operator and tax period
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: A VAT-registered person ('operator') files returns for the tax period ZIMRA assigns (for example monthly or two-monthly), due by the 25th of the following month per the Black Book records.

name: POBS
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: NSSA's Pensions and Other Benefits Scheme, to which employers remit monthly contributions.

name: ITF 16
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: ZIMRA's annual employee earnings, deductions, credits and PAYE return.

name: Tuckshop
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A very small, often informal retail outlet selling everyday goods, typically owner-operated.

name: General dealer
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A shop trading in a broad range of everyday goods; the phrase also appears as a municipal licence class in some councils.

name: Cash and carry
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A wholesale-retail hybrid where customers, often traders, pay upfront and transport goods themselves.

name: GRN (goods received note)
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The receiving document confirming quantities accepted into stock against a purchase order.

name: Shrinkage
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Stock loss between purchase and sale from theft, damage, expiry or record error.

name: Markup vs margin
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Markup is profit over cost; margin is profit over selling price. Confusing the two misprices stock.

name: Lay-bye
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A sale where the customer pays in instalments and collects the goods when fully paid.

name: Order book / credit book
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Informal record of customer credit sales kept by small retailers; the ERP replaces it with customer accounts.
